name: Feature Context Resolution
description: Resolves which features are relevant to a given task description using hybrid keyword+vector search, then builds a context block for prompt injection. Also handles post-completion feature updates.

Models/FeatureContextResult.cs.content:
class FeatureContextResult
  RelevantFeatures: List<MatchedFeature>
  IsNewFeature: bool
  SuggestedNewFeatureId: string?
  SuggestedNewFeatureName: string?
  SuggestedKeywords: List<string>?
  ContextBlock: string
class MatchedFeature
  FeatureId: string
  FeatureName: string
  Confidence: double

patterns: Confidence-gated fast path for high-confidence matches
Pending update queue for async post-task feature refresh
Tree expansion for related features above confidence threshold
